mapper.update: UPDATE chapter_progress SET position = #{position}, reading_time_seconds = #{readingTimeSeconds}, is_completed = #{isCompleted}, last_read_at = #{lastReadAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, book_id, chapter_number, position, reading_time_seconds, is_completed, last_read_at, created_at, updated_at FROM chapter_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY chapter_number
